rows.description: P Heritage's coach Hire to London (& in money 10s.6d)
rows.notes: Selected `gpt-5-mini` amounts (£1 0s 6d) as they accurately reflect the main ledger columns. `gemini-flash`'s amounts (£1 0s 0d) contradict its own descriptive note '10s.6d'. The description text from `gemini-flash` was chosen for its more accurate transcription of the parenthetical note.
rows.english_description: Coach hire for Heritage for a journey to London with a small cash disbursement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Coach hire for Heritage for a journey to London with a small cash disbursement, amounting to £1 0s 6d.

rows.description: allowed Mr Sadler p' proper Money
rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash` for both description and amounts. Visually verified amounts are £0 0s 6d. `gpt-5-mini` misread 'Sadler' as 'Foster Properg' and incorrectly extracted 6 shillings instead of 6 pence.
rows.english_description: Small petty-cash allowance paid to Mr Sadler.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Small petty-cash allowance paid to Mr Sadler, amounting to £0 0s 6d.
